About Me

More than a degree — I'm building a career in software.

It started with curiosity. I wrote my first Python script, saw it solve a real problem, and never looked back. Since then I've spent every semester not just completing coursework but building — expense trackers, student management systems, and increasingly ambitious projects that live outside the classroom.

I'm relentlessly self-taught: 100+ hours of independent learning across data structures, full-stack development, and software engineering practices. I don't just want a job — I want to grow fast and contribute meaningfully from day one.

Featured Work

Projects built to solve real problems.

Featured Project

Job Market Analytics Dashboard

A full-stack analytics platform that gives real-time insight into job market trends — built end-to-end with a Python FastAPI backend and a React + Vite frontend, then deployed live so anyone can use it. This is the most complete project in my portfolio, covering backend API design, frontend data visualization, and production deployment.

Backend Python · FastAPI
Frontend React · Vite · Tailwind CSS
Deployment Render + Netlify
  • Live dashboard with real-time job market statistics
  • Trending Roles, Salary Insights, and Search Analytics tabs
  • 30-day market trend visualization with interactive charts
  • REST API with 9+ documented endpoints (Swagger UI)
  • Fully deployed production app — backend and frontend hosted live
  • Clean, responsive dark-themed UI built with Tailwind CSS
Live Demo → View Code
⚡ New Project

SmartURL — AI-Powered URL Shortener

A production-grade URL shortener with JWT authentication, AI auto-categorisation, real-time click analytics, and a personal "My Links" dashboard. Built with a FastAPI REST backend, SQLite database via SQLAlchemy ORM, and a vanilla JS frontend with Chart.js. Every link shortened is automatically tagged by category (GitHub, YouTube, LinkedIn, Cloud…) and tracked with per-URL daily and hourly click breakdowns. Fully deployed — live backend API with Swagger docs.

Backend Python · FastAPI · SQLAlchemy
Auth JWT · Passlib (bcrypt)
Database SQLite · ORM Models
Frontend HTML · CSS · JS · Chart.js
Deployment Render + Netlify
  • 10 REST API endpoints — full CRUD with proper HTTP verbs
  • JWT authentication — secure signup/login with bcrypt password hashing
  • Personal "My Links" dashboard — per-user link management, scoped to logged-in account
  • AI categorisation — auto-tags every URL (GitHub, YouTube, Cloud…)
  • Per-URL analytics — daily & hourly click charts via Chart.js
  • Custom alias support — create memorable short links
  • Swagger UI at /docs — interactive API documentation live
  • Users table plus a separate ClickLog table for analytics without touching URL records
  • CORS-enabled — frontend/backend fully decoupled architecture
  • Click logging on every redirect — user-agent and referrer tracked
Live Demo → API Docs ↗ View Code
03 — Data Analytics · Power BI · Tableau

Retail Sales Analytics Dashboard

The Business Problem

A retail chain operating across 4 US regions was losing profitability despite growing revenue. Built a complete end-to-end data analytics project using Power BI and Tableau to uncover the root cause — over-discounting and underperforming product categories — across 9,994 real sales orders spanning 3 years (2021–2023).

  • Power BI: 4-page interactive dashboard with DAX measures, Date Table & time intelligence
  • Tableau Public: 5-sheet story dashboard — Sales Trend, Category Profit, Geo Heatmap, Discount Impact & Segment Analysis
  • Discount impact analysis proving higher discounts = negative profit (key business insight)
  • Geographic profit analysis across US states and 4 regions
  • KPI cards showing $29.7M revenue, $1.24M profit, 4.2% margin, 10K orders
BI Tool
Power BI Desktop
Viz Tool
Tableau Public

04 — Full-Stack · Civic Tech · Data Analytics

NagarFix — Civic Issue Tracker

The Business Problem

Citizens see potholes, garbage, and broken streetlights every day but have no easy way to report them or track resolution — and local bodies have no data-driven view of where problems cluster or which categories get ignored. Built an end-to-end platform that closes both gaps: a live map-based reporting app for citizens, and a status-tracking admin system feeding a Power BI analytics dashboard.

  • Live map with real-time, status-colored report pins (Leaflet + OpenStreetMap)
  • JWT-authenticated reporting flow with photo upload and geolocation capture
  • Public report tracking by ID with a full status-change history timeline
  • Admin dashboard for status updates, backed by a full audit trail (StatusHistory table)
  • Power BI dashboard connected live to the production Postgres database — category breakdown, status distribution, total volume
  • Fully deployed production app — FastAPI backend on Render, React frontend on Netlify, Postgres on Neon
Backend
Python · FastAPI · SQLAlchemy

Currently Learning

What's next on my radar.

In Progress
AI Agents & MCP (Model Context Protocol)
Building tool-using AI agents and learning MCP — the open standard for connecting agents to external tools and data sources — the core of the agentic AI stack in 2026.
In Progress
RAG & Vector Databases
Learning retrieval-augmented generation and vector search (embeddings, semantic similarity) to ground LLM applications in real data instead of just model memory.
Next Up
System Design
Learning how to design scalable, reliable systems — databases, caching, load balancing, and API architecture — the foundation AI still can't do for you.
Planned
Cloud-Native Deployment (Docker & Kubernetes)
Moving beyond free-tier hosting into containerized, orchestrated deployments — Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD pipelines on AWS/GCP.
